meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Scale SaaS
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project scalability. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade apps faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves scaling bottlenecks by enforcing modular, containerized architecture from day one. By pairing this framework with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate, ensure type safety, and standardize deployments, allowing you to ship high-quality, production-ready SaaS apps at 3x the speed of manual development.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you land a high-ticket client, but the project architecture is a house of cards. Every new feature request feels like a structural threat, and your 'speed' is actually just technical debt compounding interest. You aren't scaling; you're just running faster on a treadmill.

The shift from 'coder' to 'architect' requires an Antigravity approach—a system where your boilerplate is automated, your components are decoupled, and your infrastructure is invisible. By leveraging the Antigravity template alongside Claude Code, you can transform chaotic freelance projects into repeatable, scalable SaaS engines.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure modularity and ease of maintenance across multiple client accounts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity production template with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Automate Domain Modeling
steps.description: Use Claude Code to define your database schema and API interfaces based on your client's specific business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma schema and API endpoints for a multi-tenant SaaS application with user roles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --schema prisma/schema.prisma --context 'Generate CRUD endpoints for entities'

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe Infrastructure
steps.description: Ensure your frontend and backend communicate flawlessly by enforcing shared TypeScript interfaces.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Sync all API types to the frontend and create Zod validation schemas for all incoming request bodies.

steps.title: Deploy Standardized CI/CD Pipelines
steps.description: Configure automated testing and deployment workflows that work out-of-the-box for any Antigravity project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and staging deployment on Vercel.

steps.title: Finalize Production Readiness
steps.description: Audit the entire codebase for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities before client handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit and optimize bundle sizes for the current build.

pro_tips: Always use a custom 'base-template' repo in your Antigravity config to include your preferred linting and formatting rules.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your API endpoints *before* writing the implementation to ensure TDD speed.
Map your database relationships in a visual tool first, then export to JSON for your Antigravity prompt to avoid logic errors.
Keep your Claude Code context window clean by using .claudeignore to exclude heavy node_modules and build artifacts.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-reload' staging environment to demo features to clients in real-time during your build process.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, audit your custom components and save them as a local library to further accelerate your future client builds.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start scaling your freelance revenue today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
